  • Method Details

    • createOptionInstruction

      public ExerciseServiceCreateOptionInstructionRequestBuilder createOptionInstruction()
      Create Option Instruction

      CreateOptionInstruction creates a new option instruction for trading actions

      Returns:
      The call builder

    • createOptionInstruction

      public ExerciseServiceCreateOptionInstructionResponse createOptionInstruction(String accountId, String assetId, OptionInstructionCreate optionInstructionCreate) throws Exception
      Create Option Instruction

      CreateOptionInstruction creates a new option instruction for trading actions

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      assetId - The asset id.
      optionInstructionCreate - Represents a single options trading instruction including do not exercise, exercise by exception, and early exercise instructions
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

    • createOptionInstruction

      public ExerciseServiceCreateOptionInstructionResponse createOptionInstruction(String accountId, String assetId, OptionInstructionCreate optionInstructionCreate, Optional<Options> options) throws Exception
      Create Option Instruction

      CreateOptionInstruction creates a new option instruction for trading actions

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      assetId - The asset id.
      optionInstructionCreate - Represents a single options trading instruction including do not exercise, exercise by exception, and early exercise instructions
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      ListOptionInstructions lists option instructions with optional filtering and pagination

      CancelOptionInstruction cancels an existing instruction by name

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      assetId - The asset id.
      instructionId - The instruction id.
      cancelOptionInstructionRequestCreate - Request to cancel an existing option instruction
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      Cancel Option Instruction

      CancelOptionInstruction cancels an existing instruction by name

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      assetId - The asset id.
      instructionId - The instruction id.
      cancelOptionInstructionRequestCreate - Request to cancel an existing option instruction
      options - additional options
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
